state.next-action: Phase `18` is still in progress on `18-06`. Quick task `quick-2026-04-07-disable-mcp-autostarts` is complete: repo-local MCP auto-starts are now forced off for Grime Time, Cursor's MCP servers are disabled, and the manual launcher scripts remain available. Quick task `quick-2026-04-07-composer-bar-restoration` is complete: the copilot tools pane no longer carries embedded composer chrome, the live top composer bar retains the page fields, preview, visibility, and publish controls with a visible `Visual composer` label, and the copilot shell close control now lives in the top-right of the shell container. Quick task `quick-2026-04-07-copilot-visual-composer-toggle` also remains complete: the copilot tools panel exposes a single `Visual composer` switch for the current route, keeps content/media editing tied to the live page, and the copilot header uses an icon close control. Task `18-05` remains complete: the shared-section editor and page-composer publish surface now load native Payload version history, restore selected versions back into draft state, and keep their history lists in sync after save, publish, clone, and restore actions without adding approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling. Task `18-08` is also complete: the live canvas toolbar is now primarily single-line with an icon-only close action, the visible Structure tab has been removed in favor of live-page selection plus drawer-based page metadata controls, and hero/service/testimonial media rendering has been normalized onto the shared media component while hero copy and section copy remain editable directly on the page. Focus next on `18-06`: extend verification beyond the new restore route/UI coverage into the broader shared-section authoring matrix, especially propagation, detach/replace behavior, constrained layout rules, and focused browser coverage.
